description_long: This is an adult woman dressed in a traditional South Asian outfit, featuring a long tunic with ornate gold patterns and matching loose pants adorned with polka dots. She wears a coordinating scarf draped over one shoulder and a set of jewelry including a necklace and bracelets. Her shoes are flat and simple, complementing the overall attire. The figure has a medium build and stands with arms slightly outstretched at her sides. Her hair is styled in a voluminous, shoulder-length cut with a slight wave. The clothing and accessories suggest a festive or formal occasion, and the overall appearance is neat and culturally distinctive.
description: An adult woman in a traditional South Asian outfit with gold patterns, jewelry, and a shoulder-length hairstyle, standing upright with arms slightly out.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ornate tunic, scarf, jewelry, and facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, scarf drape, and arm position.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the tunic, pants, and hairstyle.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, scarf, and arm position similar to the left.
attribute_clothing_type: traditional long tunic with matching loose pants, scarf, and jewelry
